{{Quote|For too long the unscrupulous have been taking advantage of chinks in the bureau's armor. I say, 'no more.' The SBI will be a vital weapon in the fight against those who would fragment our Republic, and not a tool of convenience for the wealthy and corrupt. There comes a time when a structure is so riddled by greddleback bugs that you have to tear it down and build anew. If that what it takes to root out the corrupt, that's what I will do.|Armand Isard|<ref name="HNN #50" />}}
The '''Crisis Branch''' was a division of [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|SBI]], formed during emergencies. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]] formed a Crisis Branch, the first time in over sixty years it had been called into being. Isard's division was composed of Intelligence directors from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], and worked directly with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]]. Its first act was to fire local directors from 32 [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] worlds considered corrupt.<ref name="HNN #50" />
